intro.subtitle: E-LIQUID & SHISHA CALCULATOR
intro.warning_title: Focus on following safety guidelines when mixing
intro.warning_text: When mixing e-liquid, always wear protective gloves and work in a well-ventilated area, especially when using nicotine boosters. Use only quality ingredients without additives and with food-grade certification suitable for vaping from verified suppliers. Follow exact ingredient ratios. Store finished liquid out of reach of children and pets. When preparing shisha blends, use food-grade glycerin and molasses. Store hookah tobacco in an airtight container in a dry place.
intro.prep_pg_detail: Propylene glycol is a colorless, odorless liquid that forms the base of e-liquids. It provides flavor transfer and creates the characteristic "throat hit" sensation. It is hygroscopic, so store it in a closed container. PG is generally considered safe for inhalation and is also used in food and pharmaceuticals.
intro.prep_vg_detail: Vegetable glycerin is a thick, sweet liquid derived from vegetable oils. It is responsible for producing thick vapor and adds a gentle sweetness to the liquid. The higher the VG ratio, the thicker the vapor, but less pronounced flavor. VG is suitable for direct lung (DL) vaping and high-power devices.
intro.prep_flavors_detail: E-liquid flavors are concentrated aromas specifically designed for vaping. Use only flavors intended for e-liquids, not food flavorings! Concentration typically ranges between 5-20% depending on the flavor type. Fruit flavors are more intense, while dessert and tobacco flavors require higher percentages and longer steeping.
intro.prep_nicotine_detail:
Nicotine Booster: Traditional form of nicotine with a more pronounced throat hit. Suitable for regular vaping.

Nicotine Salt: A gentler form of nicotine that absorbs faster and has a weaker throat hit even at higher concentrations. Suitable for pod systems and MTL devices. WARNING: Nicotine is a poison! Always wear gloves and work in a well-ventilated area.
intro.prep_gloves_detail: Nitrile or latex gloves are essential when working with nicotine. Nicotine is easily absorbed through the skin and can cause poisoning. Gloves also protect against contamination of the mixture and maintain sterility. Use disposable gloves and dispose of them safely after work. If skin is splashed with nicotine, wash thoroughly with soap and water.
intro.prep_bottle_detail: Glass bottles are ideal for storing e-liquids as they don't react with the contents and don't affect taste. Dark glass (amber) protects from UV radiation and extends shelf life. Bottles with droppers or narrow necks are suitable for mixing. Always thoroughly clean and dry bottles before use.
intro.prep_dropper_detail: Measuring tools are essential for precise dosing of ingredients. Dropper: Suitable for smaller volumes, less precise. Pipette: More accurate than dropper, suitable for medium volumes. Syringe (without needle): Most accurate option, ideal for nicotine. Use separate tools for each ingredient to avoid contamination.
intro.prep_measuring_detail: For accurate mixing, you need reliable measuring tools. Graduated cylinders: For measuring volume in ml. Measuring syringes: Various sizes for different ingredients (1ml for nicotine, 5-10ml for VG/PG). Always measure twice and mix once!
intro.prep_shisha_glycerin_detail: Vegetable glycerin is the main carrier liquid for shisha blends. It produces the thick smoke characteristic of hookah. Use food-grade glycerin (VG) with a purity of at least 99.5%. Unlike e-liquids, glycerin is used in a much higher proportion in shisha blends (40–70%).
intro.prep_shisha_molasses_detail: Molasses (cane syrup) or honey are the traditional sweeteners and binders for shisha tobacco. Molasses adds moisture, sweetness, and helps bind glycerin and flavors. Honey is a more expensive alternative with a smoother taste. Molasses ratio is typically around 10–25% of the total blend.
intro.prep_shisha_tobacco_detail: For DIY shisha tobacco, use quality Virginia or Burley tobacco leaves. Leaves need to be soaked, de-stemmed, and cut into fine strips. Alternatively, you can use herbal blends without nicotine (tea leaves, mint leaves, etc.) for a healthier option.
intro.prep_shisha_bowl_detail: To try your mixed shisha blend, you need a hookah with a bowl. Bowls differ in material (ceramic, silicone, glass) and affect heat distribution. For best results, use a bowl with a heat management device (HMD) that regulates coal temperature.
intro.app_description: Calculator for safe mixing of e-liquids and shisha blends with precise ratio, flavor, and nicotine calculations. Features 5 e-liquid and 4 shisha calculators. Save your favorite recipes and products or share them with friends. Also works as an offline app in 31 languages.
intro.hero_headline: Mix your own e-liquid or shisha blend. Safely. Precisely. At a fraction of the cost.
intro.hero_subheadline: The calculator tells you exactly what and how much — even if you've never done it before. Pick a flavor, set the parameters, mix. The correct % fills in automatically.
intro.hero_feat_dosing_desc: nicotine, PG/VG, flavors. Results in ml and grams.
intro.hero_feat_auto_desc: pick a flavor from the database, we calculate the rest.
intro.hero_feat_recipes_desc: save, share, track steeping. Push notification: "Your liquid is ready!"
intro.hero_feat_shisha_desc: the only calculator in the world. Tobacco mix, DIY, molasses, tweak.
intro.hero_feat_stock_desc: know what you have at home and what to buy or mix.
intro.hero_savings: Store-bought liquid costs {commercial} per 100 ml. By buying ingredients and mixing yourself, it costs from {diy}. With the LiquiMixer calculator, you don't have to be afraid to save — it calculates everything simply and precisely.
intro.disclaimer_text: By clicking the "Start Mixing" button, the user confirms being at least 18 years of age. The user acknowledges that LiquiMixer serves solely as a calculation tool (calculator) and assumes no responsibility for the final product. The user bears full responsibility for proper mixing, handling of ingredients, and compliance with safety procedures.

additive.coolant_desc: Adds cooling effect without menthol flavor. WS-23 is smoothest, Koolada is stronger.
additive.sweetener_desc: Adds sweetness without calories. May gunk coils at higher percentages.
additive.enhancer_desc: Smooth reduces throat irritation, Throat Hit increases it.
additive.terpene_desc: Natural aromatic compounds. Use carefully, they are very concentrated.

shortfill.info: Shortfill is a bottle with nicotine-free e-liquid that has empty space for adding nicotine shots.
shortfill.overflow_warning: ⚠️ Warning: Content will exceed bottle capacity!

shisha.info: Hookah / Shisha calculator for mixing your own glycerin blend for water pipes.
shisha.bowl_size_hint: How much tobacco fits in your bowl
shisha.tobacco_amount_hint: Dried leaves — soak, remove stems, cut
shisha.amount_label: How much blend do I want to mix?
shisha.target_nicotine_label: How strong should the nicotine be in the blend?
shisha.ratio_optimal: Optimal ratio for shisha - balanced smoke and flavor
shisha.note_add_water: Add water to thin the blend.
shisha.note_steeping: Let the blend steep for {{days}} days for better flavor.
shisha.note_mix_weigh: Weigh individual tobaccos according to the recipe.
shisha.note_mix_blend: Thoroughly mix the tobaccos in the bowl.
shisha.note_mix_pack: Fill the bowl and pack evenly.
shisha.note_diy_prepare: Prepare tobacco leaves — soak, remove stems, cut into strips.
shisha.note_diy_prepare_herbs: Prepare herbs — chop or crush into small pieces.
shisha.note_diy_combine: Pour the molasses mix over the tobacco and mix thoroughly.
shisha.note_diy_combine_herbs: Pour the molasses mix over the herbs and mix thoroughly.
shisha.pure_pg_hint: Optional — thins the blend and enhances flavor
shisha.tweak_tobacco_hint: Ready-made commercial tobacco you want to modify
shisha.tweak_problem_label: What do I want to fix?
shisha.tweak_problem_vg: Tobacco is dry, doesn't smoke enough, too strong or too sweet
shisha.tweak_problem_flavor: I want to change / add flavor
shisha.tweak_vg_hint: Moisturizes dry tobacco and increases smoke density
shisha.tweak_vg_info: Add glycerin to a container with the tobacco, mix and seal. For dry tobacco let it rest at least 24 hours. For more smoke just mix and use right away.
shisha.tweak_taste_hint: Flavor drops for ready-made tobacco — 2–5 drops per 20 g
shisha.tweak_taste_info: Drop 2–5 drops directly on the tobacco in the bowl. Wait 1–2 minutes for absorption. For a stronger effect add one more drop, but don't overdo it — flavor boosters are very concentrated.
shisha.tweak_flavor_hint: Vape aroma concentrate — mix and let it steep
shisha.tweak_flavor_info: Add the concentrate to a container with the tobacco, mix thoroughly and let it steep for at least 2–4 hours (overnight is ideal). The concentrate needs to soak into the molasses.
shisha.tweak_nic_warn_hotspots: Mixing nicotine booster evenly into a sticky tobacco blend is very difficult. So-called 'hot spots' form — areas with high nicotine concentration. If you hit one while smoking, you may experience severe nausea, dizziness and vomiting.
shisha.tweak_nic_warn_howto: How to do it safely: Empty the tobacco into a container, add the booster, mix thoroughly and knead it for a long time, then let it steep for at least several hours, ideally overnight.
shisha.tweak_nic_warn_never: Never drop booster onto tobacco right before filling the bowl — concentrated nicotine on the leaf surface will evaporate during the first few puffs and cause an extremely harsh throat hit.
shisha.tweak_mixology_hint: Select what you want to add to the tobacco
shisha.tweak_mixology_info: Add all ingredients to a sealed container with the tobacco, mix thoroughly and let it steep for at least 2–4 hours. Slightly warm honey and molasses beforehand so they dissolve more easily.
shisha.tweak_recipe_empty: Select at least one tweak and set values.
shisha.tweak_nic_tobacco_note: 💡 Tobacco itself contains nicotine (typically 0.5–2 mg/g). Nicotine added via booster is on top of what's naturally in the tobacco.
shisha.diy_material_tobacco_hint: Dried tobacco leaves — soak, remove stems, cut into strips
shisha.diy_material_herbs_hint: Dried herbs — mint, chamomile, lavender, sage etc.
shisha.note_tweak_prepare: Weigh the tobacco into a bowl or sealable container.
shisha.note_tweak_vg: Add glycerin and mix thoroughly — the tobacco should be moist, not wet.
shisha.note_tweak_flavor: Add flavor drops / aroma concentrate and mix.
shisha.note_tweak_mixology: Add the remaining ingredients (honey, molasses, water) and mix thoroughly.
shisha.note_tweak_rest: Let the tobacco rest in a sealed container for at least 30 minutes, ideally overnight.
shisha.ratio_no_vgpg: The blend does not contain VG or PG yet. Add flavor or glycerin for proper consistency.
shisha.ratio_low_only_vg: ✅ OK — glycerin ({{vg}} % of volume) ensures thick smoke. Adding PG-based flavors will help the blend absorb into the tobacco.
shisha.ratio_low_only_pg: ⚠ Without glycerin the blend will be thin and may irritate the throat. Add at least 15–20 % glycerin.
shisha.ratio_low_pg_dominant: ⚠ Higher PG ({{pg}} % vs VG {{vg}} %) — strong flavor, but watch for throat irritation. Don't exceed 15 % total PG. We recommend adding at least 15–20 % glycerin.
shisha.ratio_low_balanced: ✅ OK — VG ({{vg}} %) and PG ({{pg}} %) in acceptable ratio. The rest is sweetener and water.
shisha.ratio_extreme_vg: ⚠ Too thick blend — risk of burning and poor draw. Add flavor or reduce glycerin.
shisha.ratio_high_vg: ⚠ Very thick blend — may burn on the coals. Consider adding flavor (PG base) for better consistency.
shisha.ratio_ideal_vg: ✅ Excellent — thick smoke and good flavor. Ideal ratio for most shisha blends.
shisha.ratio_balanced: ✅ Balanced ratio — pleasant smoke and flavor. Universal base for shisha.
shisha.ratio_high_pg: ⚠ Too thin blend — weak smoke, may irritate the throat. Add glycerin for thicker smoke and smoother draw.
shisha.ratio_extreme_pg: ❌ Not suitable for shisha — almost no smoke, will irritate the throat. Add glycerin (at least 30 % VG).
shisha.base_sweet_very_high: Very sweet blend. High sweetener content can be too intense and overpower other flavors. We recommend reducing below 60 %.
shisha.base_sweet_high: Sweet blend with a pronounced flavor base. Suitable for fruity and dessert flavors.
shisha.base_sweet_balanced: Balanced blend. Good ratio of sweetness and density, universal base for most flavors.
shisha.base_sweet_low: Less sweet blend. Glycerin dominates, the blend will be thicker with more pronounced smoke.
shisha.base_sweet_minimal: Minimal sweetness. The blend will have the character of pure glycerin with water.
shisha.base_sweet_none: No sweetener. Only glycerin and water — neutral base suitable for strong flavors.
shisha.base_water_very_high: Warning: high water content (over 30 %) significantly thins the blend and reduces smoke production.
shisha.base_water_high: Higher water content ensures a thinner blend with a lighter draw.
shisha.base_water_medium: Moderate amount of water for a balanced draw.
shisha.base_water_low: Low water content — thicker blend with more intense smoke.
shisha.base_glyc_very_high: Very thick blend due to high glycerin — rich smoke.
shisha.base_glyc_low: Low glycerin — the blend will be thinner with less smoke production.
shisha.base_glyc_none: No glycerin — minimal smoke production, only sweetener and water.

results.title: Your Recipe
results.notes_adjustment: If needed, adjust with pure PG or VG.
results.notes_4: Shake thoroughly and let steep for 1-2 weeks
results.dilute_notes_1: Work with gloves - nicotine is absorbed through skin!

ratio_descriptions.vg_0_9: Maximum vapor, no flavor or throat hit. Designed for high-power devices >80W, otherwise the coil clogs.
ratio_descriptions.vg_10_29: Maximum vapor, minimal flavor without throat hit. Thick liquid for cloud vaping. Designed for high-power devices >80W, otherwise the coil clogs.
ratio_descriptions.vg_30_34: Strong vapor, weakening or spoiled flavor. Still thick liquid.
ratio_descriptions.vg_35_40: Noticeable vapor increase, flavor remains present. Balanced liquid with emphasis on vapor.
ratio_descriptions.vg_41_55: Balanced ratio of vapor and flavor, suitable for most devices.
ratio_descriptions.vg_56_60: Gentle throat hit, present flavor, weaker vapor. Suitable for MTL devices.
ratio_descriptions.vg_61_70: More pronounced throat hit, strong flavor. For experienced vapers.
ratio_descriptions.vg_71_90: Throat irritation and scratching for dry air, strong flavor. Only for special DTL devices with higher coil resistance.
ratio_descriptions.vg_91_100: Throat irritation and scratching for dry air, maximum flavor and nicotine. No vapor. Only for special DTL devices with higher resistance.

ratio_warning.limited_to: Ratio limited to {min}–{max}% VG due to: {reasons}.
ratio_warning.limited_nicotine: Ratio limited to {min}–{max}% VG due to nicotine base ratio.

nicotine_descriptions.nic_0: No nicotine - suitable for non-smokers or gradual cessation.
nicotine_descriptions.nic_1_3: Very light nicotine - for occasional vapers and final cessation stages.
nicotine_descriptions.nic_4_6: Light nicotine - for light smokers (up to 10 cigarettes per day).
nicotine_descriptions.nic_7_11: Medium nicotine - for moderate smokers (10-20 cigarettes per day).
nicotine_descriptions.nic_12_20: For heavy smokers, strong cigarettes, nausea may occur without prior experience.
nicotine_descriptions.nic_21_35: High nicotine - only for very heavy smokers or pod systems. Nicotine salt recommended.
nicotine_descriptions.nic_36_45: Extremely strong - only for pod systems with nicotine salt. Risk of overdose!

shisha_nicotine_descriptions.sh_nic_0: No nicotine - traditional shisha experience without nicotine.
shisha_nicotine_descriptions.sh_nic_1_2: Very light - gentle nicotine touch, suitable for beginners.
shisha_nicotine_descriptions.sh_nic_3_4: Light - mild nicotine for occasional users.
shisha_nicotine_descriptions.sh_nic_5_6: Medium - balanced strength for regular users.
shisha_nicotine_descriptions.sh_nic_7_8: Stronger - for experienced users, may cause dizziness.
shisha_nicotine_descriptions.sh_nic_9_10: Strong - maximum recommended strength for shisha, only for experienced users.

flavor_descriptions.no_percentage_warning: The manufacturer does not provide recommended dosage for this flavor. Check the packaging or manufacturer/retailer website for correct information.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.section1_text: These Terms and Conditions govern the rights and obligations of the parties when providing the LiquiMixer service, operated by WOOs, s. r. o., Company ID: 05117810, VAT ID: CZ05117810, registered office at Brloh 12, 397 01 Drhovle, Czech Republic.
terms.section2_text: The subject of the contract is the provision of access to the LiquiMixer online application for e-liquid recipe calculations for a period of 365 days from the subscription activation date.
terms.section3_text: The subscription price includes VAT. Payment is a one-time charge for 365 days processed through the GP webpay payment gateway. An invoice is automatically issued and sent to your email after successful payment.
terms.section4_text: Due to the nature of digital content and immediate service activation, the consumer agrees that they waive the right to withdraw from the contract. After payment, the user waives the right to a refund for the subscription, as the administrative costs of refunding are higher than the subscription payment itself.
terms.section5_text: In case of technical issues with the service, please contact support via the contact form. Complaints will be resolved within 30 days.
terms.section6_text: Personal data processing is governed by GDPR. Data is processed only for service provision purposes and is not shared with third parties except for the payment gateway.
terms.section7_text: By using the LiquiMixer application, the user confirms that they are at least 18 years of age. The user acknowledges that LiquiMixer serves solely as a calculation tool (calculator) and assumes no responsibility for the final product. The user bears full responsibility for proper mixing, handling of ingredients, and compliance with safety procedures.
terms.section8_text: This website does not sell vaping devices, e-liquids, or any other vaping-related products. The operator does not promote vaping or smoking. Vaping and the use of nicotine products are harmful to health. The LiquiMixer application functions solely as a calculator for recipe calculations and assumes no responsibility for the use of these calculations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_contact: Contact: via the contact form in the app (Menu → Contact)
privacy.section2_intro: As part of providing the LiquiMixer service, we process the following personal data:
privacy.section2_list2: Payment data: transaction details (processed by GP WebPay payment gateway)
privacy.section2_list3: User data: saved recipes, products, app settings
privacy.section2_list4: Technical data: IP address, browser type, language
privacy.section3_intro: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.section3_list1: Providing the LiquiMixer service and managing your user account
privacy.section3_list3: Sending important information about the service (changes to terms, technical notices)
privacy.section3_list4: Improving the service and user experience
privacy.section4_intro: We process personal data based on:
privacy.section4_list1: Contract performance - providing the LiquiMixer service
privacy.section4_list2: Legal obligation - accounting and tax regulations
privacy.section5_list1: User account: for the duration of the account + 3 months after deletion
privacy.section5_list2: Invoices and payment data: 10 years (legal requirement)
privacy.section5_list3: Saved recipes: for the duration of the account
privacy.section6_intro: We share your data only with:
privacy.section6_list2: Clerk - authentication and user account management
privacy.section6_outro: All these providers comply with GDPR requirements.
privacy.section7_intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.section7_list1: Right of access - obtain information about processed data
privacy.section7_list2: Right to rectification - correct inaccurate data
privacy.section7_list3: Right to erasure - request deletion of your data
privacy.section7_list4: Right to restriction of processing - limit how data is processed
privacy.section7_list5: Right to data portability - obtain data in machine-readable format
privacy.section7_list6: Right to lodge a complaint - with the Data Protection Authority
privacy.section7_how_text: To exercise any right, contact us via the contact form in the app (Menu → Contact → GDPR / Data Deletion).
privacy.section8_intro: You can delete your account and all associated data by contacting support via the contact form with a deletion request (Menu → Contact → GDPR / Data Deletion).
privacy.section8_outro: After account deletion, your data will be removed within 30 days, except for data we are legally required to retain (invoices).
privacy.section9_intro: The LiquiMixer app uses only essential technical cookies for:
privacy.section9_outro: We do not use analytics or advertising cookies.

manual.title: LiquiMixer Manual
manual.basics_text: LiquiMixer is a calculator for mixing e-liquids and shisha blends for hookah. It features 5 e-liquid calculators (Liquid, Liquid PRO, Shake & Vape, Shortfill, Base Dilution) and 4 shisha calculators (Tobacco Mix, DIY Tobacco, Tobacco Tweak, Molasses Mix). Simply enter the desired values and the calculator will automatically compute the exact amount of each ingredient. The result displays a clear table with precise volumes or weights for each component.
manual.pgvg_text: PG (propylene glycol) and VG (vegetable glycerin) are the two base carrier liquids of every e-liquid. PG is thinner, carries flavor better and creates a more pronounced throat hit. VG is thicker, sweeter and produces large amounts of vapor. The ratio of these two components fundamentally affects the vaping experience.
manual.pgvg_ratios_text:
50/50 — universal ratio, balanced flavor and vapor. Suitable for most devices.
30/70 (PG/VG) — more vapor, smoother throat hit. Popular for sub-ohm vaping.
20/80 (PG/VG) — maximum vapor, very smooth. For high-powered low-resistance devices.
70/30 (PG/VG) — strong flavor and pronounced throat hit. For MTL (mouth-to-lung) devices and pod systems.
Choose the ratio based on your device and preferences. The calculator automatically computes the correct amount of pure PG and VG.

All calculators also support working with a premixed base (premix) — a ready-made PG/VG blend in a specific ratio. When using a premixed base, the calculator automatically sets the VG/PG ratio to match your base composition so there is no need to add extra pure VG or PG.
manual.calc_text: The calculator works with the total volume you want to mix. From this volume, it first calculates the amount of nicotine base needed to reach the target nicotine strength. Then it subtracts the flavor volume (entered as a percentage of the total). The remainder is filled with pure PG and VG to match your desired ratio.
manual.calc_flavor_title: How Flavors Affect the PG/VG Ratio
manual.calc_flavor_text: Flavors are not pure PG — they contain a mix of components: propylene glycol (PG), glycerin (VG), but also alcohol, water and other carrier substances. The calculator therefore does not count the entire flavor volume as PG. Instead, it breaks down each flavor into its actual components — the PG portion counts toward total PG, the VG portion toward VG, and other components (alcohol, water) are subtracted from the total volume but do not count toward the VG/PG ratio. This ensures the final ratio is accurate even when using multiple flavors with different compositions.
manual.calc_nic_title: How Nicotine Base Affects the Ratio
manual.calc_nic_text: The same principle applies to nicotine base — it has its own PG/VG ratio (e.g. 50/50 or 100% PG). The calculator includes its PG and VG content in the overall ratio and fills the remaining volume with pure PG and VG to get as close as possible to your desired ratio. If the nicotine base or flavors contain too much PG, the calculator will warn you that the desired ratio cannot be achieved exactly.
manual.nic_text: Nicotine base is a concentrated nicotine solution in PG, VG, or a mix of both. You enter its strength (mg/ml) and PG/VG ratio. The calculator then determines how much base you need to reach the target nicotine strength in the final liquid. If mixing without nicotine, simply set the target strength to 0.
manual.flavors_text: Flavors are entered as a percentage of the total volume. For example, 10% flavor in a 100ml mix = 10 ml of flavor. The LiquiMixer database contains thousands of flavors with manufacturer-recommended dosing, so you don't have to guess. The recommended percentage is automatically pre-filled when selecting a flavor from the database.
manual.calculators_text:
🟢 E-LIQUID CALCULATORS (5):

Liquid — basic calculator for one flavor. Enter volume, nicotine strength, PG/VG ratio and flavor percentage. Ideal for beginners and simple recipes.

Liquid PRO — advanced calculator for up to 4 flavors simultaneously. Each flavor can have a different percentage and VG/PG ratio. For complex recipes and experienced mixers.

Shake & Vape — for ready-made flavor concentrates in a bottle (shake and vape). You buy a bottle with concentrated flavor and top it up with nicotine base and carrier liquid according to your preferences. The calculator computes how much of each to add.

Shortfill — for adding nicotine shots to ready-made nicotine-free liquids. Enter the bottle volume, shot strength and target nicotine strength. The calculator computes how many shots you need.

Nicotine Base Dilution — for diluting too-strong nicotine base to a lower concentration. Useful when you have a strong base (e.g. 72 mg/ml) and need to dilute it to a working strength.

🟡 SHISHA CALCULATORS (4):

Tobacco Mix — calculator for blending different hookah tobaccos. Enter the ratios of individual tobaccos and total weight. Ideal for creating your own tobacco blends.

DIY Tobacco — complete calculator for making shisha tobacco from scratch. Combines tobacco leaves (or herbs), glycerin, molasses/honey, flavors and optionally nicotine. The calculator computes the exact amount of each component.

Tobacco Tweak — for enhancing existing shisha tobacco. Add glycerin for more smoke, flavor drops, nicotine, or honey/molasses. The calculator computes the correct dosage of additives to existing tobacco.

Molasses Mix — calculator for mixing glycerin molasses without tobacco. Works with glycerin as the main carrier, molasses/honey as sweetener and flavors. Suitable for herbal fills or preparing a molasses base.
manual.steeping_text:
Most liquids need time to steep after mixing — flavors blend better and the resulting taste is fuller. Steeping time depends on the flavor type:

Fruit flavors: 1–3 days. Often good right after mixing.
Beverage flavors: 3–7 days.
Cream and dessert: 1–2 weeks. Taste improves significantly after steeping.
Tobacco flavors: 2–4 weeks. Need the longest steeping time.

During steeping, store the liquid in a dark place at room temperature. Shake the bottle occasionally. LiquiMixer can set a reminder that will notify you via push notification when your liquid is steeped.
manual.recipes_text: Every calculation can be saved as a recipe for later use. A saved recipe contains all ingredients, their exact volumes and settings. Recipes can be shared with other users in the public database, where they can be rated and commented on. When sharing, recipes go through automatic content moderation. You can also share recipes directly via link or QR code — the recipient opens the recipe in LiquiMixer and can mix it right away.
manual.products_text: In the products section, you can save the ingredients you use (bases, flavors, VG, PG). For each product, you can track stock levels and link it to recipes to see what you need to restock.
manual.subscription_text: Basic calculators (Liquid, Shake & Vape, Shortfill, Shisha, Base Dilution) are free for all users. PRO subscription unlocks advanced features: Liquid PRO calculator (up to 4 flavors simultaneously), cloud recipe saving with cross-device sync, access to thousands of flavors with manufacturer-recommended dosing, steeping reminders with push notifications, product stock tracking and priority support.
manual.tips_text:
1. Start with simple recipes — one flavor, 8–12%, 50/50 ratio.
2. Always wear protective gloves when handling nicotine — it absorbs through skin.
3. Mix in clean containers and store in a dark, cool place away from children.
4. Let the liquid steep — the taste improves significantly, especially with cream and tobacco flavors.
5. Write down your recipes — even a small change in percentages can dramatically change the flavor.
6. Don't exceed recommended flavor dosing — more doesn't mean stronger taste, it can actually cause flavor muting.
7. When mixing multiple flavors, start with lower percentages and adjust gradually.
8. Browse the recipe database for inspiration — you'll find hundreds of verified recipes from other mixers that you can try right away or customize to your taste.
manual.safety_text: Nicotine is a toxic substance — when handling concentrated nicotine base (especially 72 mg/ml and above) always wear protective gloves and work in a well-ventilated area. If skin contact occurs, wash immediately with soap and water. Store nicotine base out of reach of children and pets in a locked cabinet. Store finished liquids in bottles with child-resistant caps. LiquiMixer is a calculation tool — all responsibility for safe mixing and handling of ingredients lies with the user.
manual.offline_text: LiquiMixer works even without an internet connection. After the first load, the app is saved to your device and you can use it anytime. On mobile, you can add it to your home screen like a regular app — just choose 'Add to Home Screen' or 'Install' in your browser. The app then behaves like a native app with its own icon.
